notes: Power input is IEC 60320 C14 (listed as "iec" — the connector enum covers C13/C14 family; C14 is the male inlet on the device). All 8 outlets are IEC 60320 C13, individually switched. Network management port is 10/100 Base-T Ethernet via RJ45. Serial management port is physically RJ12 (6P6C), not a full RJ45 — mapped to rj45 as closest available connector in the enum; note in field reflects actual connector. The "type" field value "PDU" is not in the allowed enum; closest match is "Power conditioner" — device is actually a switched rack PDU. Confidence medium because the official APC/Schneider Electric product pages returned 403; specs confirmed via apcguard.com and cross-referenced with B&H Photo listing and community sources.

ports.name: AC In
ports.note: IEC 60320 C14 inlet; captive 1.9 m cord; 12A/208V or 10A/230V

ports.name: Network
ports.note: 10/100 Base-T Ethernet for network management card

ports.name: Serial
ports.note: RJ12 (6P6C) serial management port, 9600 baud 8N1; closest standard connector is rj45 — actual physical connector is RJ12/6P6C
